---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    code-fold: false
    code-copy: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="redesign-page redesign-page--home editorial-home">

<section class="editorial-hero reveal-on-scroll">
  <div class="editorial-hero__copy">
    <p class="editorial-hero__eyebrow">Research Data Manager · AI Systems · Nairobi, Kenya</p>
    <h1 class="editorial-hero__title">Field reality, data systems, and decision-grade analytics.</h1>
    <p class="editorial-hero__lede">
      I build research and data systems that hold up outside ideal conditions:
      from survey design and field supervision to ETL pipelines, dashboard workflows,
      and AI-ready infrastructure teams can trust.
    </p>
    <div class="editorial-hero__actions">
      <a href="projects/index.html" class="btn-solid">Selected Work</a>
      <a href="about/index.html" class="btn-ghost">My Story</a>
    </div>
    <dl class="editorial-hero__meta" aria-label="Selected background details">
      <div class="editorial-hero__meta-item">
        <dt>Base</dt>
        <dd>Nairobi, Kenya</dd>
      </div>
      <div class="editorial-hero__meta-item">
        <dt>Scope</dt>
        <dd>4 countries · 8+ years</dd>
      </div>
      <div class="editorial-hero__meta-item">
        <dt>Focus</dt>
        <dd>Research, systems, impact</dd>
      </div>
    </dl>
  </div>

  <figure class="editorial-hero__visual">
    <div class="editorial-hero__image-shell">
      <img
        src="img/professor nyongo launching the dashboard.jpeg"
        alt="Kisumu dashboard launch showing decision-focused health analytics in practice"
        class="editorial-hero__image"
        onerror="this.parentElement.classList.add('is-empty')"
      >
    </div>
    <figcaption class="editorial-hero__caption">
      Kisumu dashboard launch. Evidence becomes useful when teams can see it, question it, and act on it.
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
</section>

<section class="proof-ribbon-shell reveal-on-scroll" aria-label="Selected proof points">
  <div class="proof-ribbon">
    <div class="proof-ribbon-track">
      <div class="proof-ribbon-group">
        <span class="proof-ribbon-item">
          <span class="proof-ribbon-label">Architecture</span>
          <strong>1,000+ households</strong>
          <span>Health financial diaries, QA, and live dashboards</span>
        </span>
        <span class="proof-ribbon-item">
          <span class="proof-ribbon-label">Operations</span>
          <strong>50+ field staff</strong>
          <span>Training, supervision, and multi-site delivery workflows</span>
        </span>
        <span class="proof-ribbon-item">
          <span class="proof-ribbon-label">Direction</span>
          <strong>AI-ready systems</strong>
          <span>Reproducible analytics, model thinking, and careful monitoring</span>
        </span>
        <span class="proof-ribbon-item">
          <span class="proof-ribbon-label">Range</span>
          <strong>Public systems to agriculture</strong>
          <span>Health, MEL, finance, real estate, and operations</span>
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-pad section-divider reveal-on-scroll">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="chapter-band chapter-band--research">
      <div class="chapter-band__index">Chapter 01</div>
      <div class="chapter-band__body">
        <p class="chapter-band__eyebrow">Research</p>
        <h2 class="chapter-band__title">Studies and monitoring systems built for low-connectivity reality.</h2>
        <p class="chapter-band__text">
          I design studies, digitize tools, train teams, and build data quality systems that survive the conditions where most real-world work actually happens.
        </p>
        <ul class="chapter-band__points">
          <li>RCTs, quasi-experimental studies, and donor-facing evaluation workflows</li>
          <li>ODK, KoboToolbox, REDCap, and field-ready instrument design</li>
          <li>Enumerator training, HFC rhythms, and clean handoff into analysis</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="chapter-band__links">
          <a href="research/publications.html">Research Archive</a>
          <a href="projects/index.html">Project Index</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-pad section-divider reveal-on-scroll">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="chapter-band chapter-band--systems">
      <div class="chapter-band__index">Chapter 02</div>
      <div class="chapter-band__body">
        <p class="chapter-band__eyebrow">Systems</p>
        <h2 class="chapter-band__title">The middle of the stack: ETL, QA, dashboards, and AI infrastructure.</h2>
        <p class="chapter-band__text">
          My strongest work lives in the translation layer between messy collection environments and the reporting, modeling, and product systems that leaders actually rely on.
        </p>
        <ul class="chapter-band__points">
          <li>R, Python, SQL, and Quarto pipelines that teams can rerun and audit</li>
          <li>Dashboard workflows for decision support, not just presentation polish</li>
          <li>Analytics engineering and model monitoring grounded in statistical discipline</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="chapter-band__links">
          <a href="projects/analytics-engineering/index.html">Analytics Engineering</a>
          <a href="software/index.html">Software &amp; Tools</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-pad section-divider reveal-on-scroll">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="chapter-band chapter-band--impact">
      <div class="chapter-band__index">Chapter 03</div>
      <div class="chapter-band__body">
        <p class="chapter-band__eyebrow">Impact</p>
        <h2 class="chapter-band__title">Evidence that helps teams decide, not just report.</h2>
        <p class="chapter-band__text">
          The goal is not only clean data. It is better judgment: clearer trade-offs, faster insight loops, and systems that keep learning after the first dashboard or paper is shipped.
        </p>
        <ul class="chapter-band__points">
          <li>Policy briefs, executive dashboards, and research outputs tied to operational use</li>
          <li>Cross-domain work in public health, agriculture, finance, and urban systems</li>
          <li>Open to roles where field reality, systems design, and AI meet</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="chapter-band__links">
          <a href="resources/index.html">Resources</a>
          <a href="cv/index.html">View CV</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="featured-ledger section-pad section-divider reveal-on-scroll">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <p class="section-eyebrow">Selected Evidence</p>
    <h2 class="section-h">Three case files that show how I work.</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Each one combines context, methods, and outcomes rather than just listing tools.</p>

    <div class="featured-ledger__grid">
      <a href="research/thesis.html" class="ledger-card">
        <div class="ledger-card__media">
          <img
            src="img/professor nyongo sharing the great insights for policy they see from the dashboard.jpeg"
            alt="Policy insight session using health financing dashboard outputs"
            class="ledger-card__image"
            onerror="this.remove()"
          >
        </div>
        <div class="ledger-card__body">
          <p class="ledger-card__meta">2026 · Public Health · Mixed Methods</p>
          <h3 class="ledger-card__title">Financing chronic care in rural Kenya</h3>
          <p class="ledger-card__text">
            A seven-facility study on how narrow funding streams, approval delays, and missing NCD budget lines disrupt hypertension and diabetes care.
          </p>
          <dl class="ledger-card__facts">
            <div><dt>Methods</dt><dd>Facility interviews, household data, policy analysis</dd></div>
            <div><dt>Output</dt><dd>Thesis, manuscript, and dashboard-ready evidence</dd></div>
          </dl>
          <span class="ledger-card__action">Open case file →</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a href="projects/analytics-engineering/healthcare-readmission-risk/index.html" class="ledger-card">
        <div class="ledger-card__media ledger-card__media--abstract">
          <span>Readmission Risk</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ledger-card__body">
          <p class="ledger-card__meta">2026 · Analytics Engineering · Predictive Workflow</p>
          <h3 class="ledger-card__title">Healthcare readmission risk pipeline</h3>
          <p class="ledger-card__text">
            Portfolio work that connects data preparation, modeling logic, and decision support in a clinically legible way.
          </p>
          <dl class="ledger-card__facts">
            <div><dt>Stack</dt><dd>Python, SQL, ML workflow design</dd></div>
            <div><dt>Focus</dt><dd>Prediction with monitoring and interpretability in view</dd></div>
          </dl>
          <span class="ledger-card__action">Open case file →</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a href="projects/ai-applications/research-brief-generator/index.html" class="ledger-card">
        <div class="ledger-card__media ledger-card__media--abstract ledger-card__media--warm">
          <span>Research Brief Generator</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ledger-card__body">
          <p class="ledger-card__meta">2026 · AI Applications · Research Ops</p>
          <h3 class="ledger-card__title">Research brief generator</h3>
          <p class="ledger-card__text">
            An AI-assisted workflow for turning structured inputs into clearer summaries and reusable research communication artifacts.
          </p>
          <dl class="ledger-card__facts">
            <div><dt>Role</dt><dd>Problem framing, pipeline design, and interface logic</dd></div>
            <div><dt>Value</dt><dd>Faster synthesis without losing structure</dd></div>
          </dl>
          <span class="ledger-card__action">Open case file →</span>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="positioning-bridge section-pad section-divider reveal-on-scroll">
  <div class="section-inner positioning-bridge__layout">
    <div class="positioning-bridge__lead">
      <p class="section-eyebrow">Positioning</p>
      <h2 class="section-h">I sit where field evidence, reproducible analytics, and AI systems meet.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="positioning-bridge__body">
      <p>
        The through-line in my work is not a single domain. It is building systems that can move from collection to judgment without losing rigor. That is as true for health financing and monitoring work as it is for analytics engineering and ML-facing projects.
      </p>
      <div class="positioning-bridge__links">
        <a href="projects/index.html">Projects</a>
        <a href="research/publications.html">Research</a>
        <a href="cv/index.html">CV</a>
        <a href="resources/index.html">Resources</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="collab-channel section-pad section-divider reveal-on-scroll" id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner collab-channel__layout">
    <div class="collab-channel__copy">
      <p class="collab-channel__status">Channel Open</p>
      <h2 class="collab-channel__title">What if we worked together?</h2>
      <p class="collab-channel__text">
        I’m open to research data leadership, analytics engineering, and collaborative work where evidence has to survive operational reality, not just a demo environment.
      </p>
      <p class="collab-channel__note">For teams building better health systems, stronger data infrastructure, and credible AI workflows.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="collab-channel__actions">
      <a href="mailto:nichodemuswerre@gmail.com" class="collab-channel__email">nichodemuswerre@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="mailto:nichodemuswerre@gmail.com" class="collab-channel__cta">Initiate Contact</a>
      <div class="collab-channel__links">
        <a href="https://github.com/gondamol" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nichodemusamollo/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</div>

<script>
(function() {
  var prefersReduced = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  var revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal-on-scroll');

  if (!prefersReduced) {
    var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      entries.forEach(function(entry) {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
          observer.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -32px 0px' });

    revealEls.forEach(function(el) { observer.observe(el); });
  } else {
    revealEls.forEach(function(el) { el.classList.add('is-visible'); });
  }

  var track = document.querySelector('.proof-ribbon-track');
  var group = track ? track.querySelector('.proof-ribbon-group') : null;
  if (track && group && !track.dataset.enhanced) {
    var clone = group.cloneNode(true);
    clone.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    track.appendChild(clone);
    track.dataset.enhanced = 'true';
  }

  var navbar = document.querySelector('.navbar');
  if (navbar) {
    window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
      if (window.scrollY > 20) {
        navbar.classList.add('scrolled');
      } else {
        navbar.classList.remove('scrolled');
      }
    }, { passive: true });
  }
})();
</script>
```
